description: Application loads with welcome modal blocking interactions - verify app startup displays authentication modal as overlay
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for page to load completely
Step 3: Verify welcome modal is visible and centered
Step 4: Verify backdrop/overlay prevents clicking elements behind modal
Step 5: Verify main application interface is not accessible

description: Welcome modal displays SignalWire logo at top
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Verify SignalWire logo is present at top of modal card

description: Welcome modal shows token input mode by default with toggle to switch modes
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Verify tab/radio toggle exists for 'Enter Token' and 'Fetch from URL' modes
Step 4: Verify default mode is 'Enter Token'
Step 5: Verify text input field is visible with appropriate placeholder

description: Welcome modal token mode accepts direct SAT token input
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Ensure 'Enter Token' mode is selected
Step 4: Enter a test token string in the input field
Step 5: Verify the input field accepts and displays the token value

description: Welcome modal URL mode allows entering endpoint URL to fetch token
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Click on 'Fetch from URL' toggle/tab
Step 4: Verify input field placeholder changes to indicate URL input
Step 5: Enter a test URL in the input field
Step 6: Verify the input field accepts and displays the URL value

description: Welcome modal displays validation error for invalid token
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Enter an invalid/malformed token string
Step 4: Click submit button
Step 5: Verify clear error message is displayed below input
Step 6: Verify modal remains open

description: Welcome modal displays error for failed URL fetch
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Switch to 'Fetch from URL' mode
Step 4: Enter an invalid or non-existent URL
Step 5: Click submit button
Step 6: Verify loading spinner appears during fetch attempt
Step 7: Verify clear error message is displayed for fetch failure
Step 8: Verify modal remains open

description: Welcome modal URL mode fetches token from JSON endpoint
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Switch to 'Fetch from URL' mode
Step 4: Enter a valid token endpoint URL that returns {"token": "..."}
Step 5: Click submit button
Step 6: Verify loading spinner appears
Step 7: Verify successful fetch extracts token from JSON response

description: Welcome modal closes on valid token and main interface becomes accessible
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Enter a valid SAT token
Step 4: Click submit button
Step 5: Verify modal closes with animation
Step 6: Verify main application interface is now visible and accessible
Step 7: Verify SignalWire client initializes with provided token

description: Welcome modal cannot be dismissed without valid authentication
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Attempt to click outside the modal
Step 4: Verify modal does not close
Step 5: Attempt to press Escape key
Step 6: Verify modal does not close
Step 7: Verify no close button is present on modal

description: Submit button is full width in welcome modal
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Wait for welcome modal to appear
Step 3: Verify submit button spans full width of the modal content area

description: Top bar displays current registration status with visual indicator
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify top bar is visible at top of page
Step 3: Verify registration status indicator is present in center of top bar
Step 4: Verify status shows unregistered state (gray indicator)
Step 5: Toggle registration on
Step 6: Verify status shows registered state (green indicator)

description: Registration toggle switch allows user to register/unregister
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Locate registration toggle switch in top bar
Step 3: Verify toggle is in unregistered/off state initially
Step 4: Click toggle to register
Step 5: Verify toggle changes to registered/on state
Step 6: Click toggle again to unregister
Step 7: Verify toggle returns to unregistered/off state

description: User display name appears in top bar when registered
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Toggle registration on
Step 3: Verify user's display_name appears in the right section of top bar
Step 4: Toggle registration off
Step 5: Verify display name behavior when unregistered (hidden or placeholder)

description: Available channels display as badges/icons in top bar
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Toggle registration on
Step 3: Verify channel badges/icons are visible in top bar (audio, video, messaging)
Step 4: Verify each available channel has corresponding visual indicator

description: Registration status updates reactively via SDK observables
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify initial status is unregistered
Step 3: Toggle registration on
Step 4: Verify UI updates immediately without page refresh
Step 5: Simulate connection loss scenario
Step 6: Verify status indicator updates to reflect connection state

description: Sidebar displays three main menu items with distinct icons
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify sidebar is visible on left side of application
Step 3: Verify 'Select Devices' menu item with icon is present
Step 4: Verify 'Open Directory' menu item with icon is present
Step 5: Verify 'Dialpad Calls' menu item with icon is present
Step 6: Verify each menu item has a distinct, recognizable icon

description: Sidebar collapse/expand toggle at bottom
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify sidebar is in expanded state showing icons and labels
Step 3: Locate collapse toggle button at bottom of sidebar
Step 4: Click toggle button
Step 5: Verify sidebar collapses to show icons only
Step 6: Click toggle button again
Step 7: Verify sidebar expands to show icons with labels

description: Collapsed sidebar shows tooltips on hover
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Collapse the sidebar
Step 3: Hover over 'Select Devices' icon
Step 4: Verify tooltip appears showing 'Select Devices' label
Step 5: Hover over 'Open Directory' icon
Step 6: Verify tooltip appears showing 'Open Directory' label
Step 7: Hover over 'Dialpad Calls' icon
Step 8: Verify tooltip appears showing 'Dialpad Calls' label

description: Active menu item is highlighted visually
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click on 'Select Devices' menu item
Step 3: Verify 'Select Devices' has highlighted/active styling
Step 4: Click on 'Open Directory' menu item
Step 5: Verify 'Open Directory' now has highlighted styling
Step 6: Verify 'Select Devices' no longer has highlighted styling

description: Sidebar hover state shows subtle background change
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Ensure a menu item is not currently active
Step 3: Hover over the inactive menu item
Step 4: Verify subtle background color change on hover
Step 5: Move mouse away
Step 6: Verify background returns to normal state

description: Sidebar state does not persist between sessions
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Collapse the sidebar
Step 3: Refresh the page
Step 4: Re-authenticate with valid token
Step 5: Verify sidebar returns to default expanded state

description: Select Devices view displays sw-device-selector component
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click on 'Select Devices' menu item in sidebar
Step 3: Verify main content area displays sw-device-selector component
Step 4: Verify device selector is fully functional and interactive

description: Device selector shows three labeled dropdowns: Microphone, Camera, Speaker
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Verify 'Microphone' label and dropdown selector is present
Step 4: Verify 'Camera' label and dropdown selector is present
Step 5: Verify 'Speaker' label and dropdown selector is present
Step 6: Verify all three device sections are visible simultaneously

description: Camera section shows live video preview inline below dropdown when show-preview enabled
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Verify Camera label and dropdown selector is visible
Step 4: Grant camera permissions if prompted
Step 5: Verify live video preview is displayed inline below the camera dropdown
Step 6: Verify preview shows actual camera feed (mirrored horizontally)

description: Microphone section shows audio level indicator inline below dropdown when show-preview enabled
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Verify Microphone label and dropdown selector is visible
Step 4: Grant microphone permissions if prompted
Step 5: Verify audio level indicator is displayed inline below the microphone dropdown
Step 6: Make sound and verify level indicator responds with color changes

description: Speaker section provides test tone button
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Verify Speaker dropdown is visible with label
Step 4: Verify test tone button is present below device sections
Step 5: Click test tone button
Step 6: Verify audio plays through selected speaker

description: Device changes apply immediately to SDK
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Note current selected camera device
Step 4: Select a different camera device from dropdown
Step 5: Verify SDK's DeviceController receives new device selection
Step 6: Verify inline video preview below camera dropdown updates to show new camera feed

description: Device selections persist when navigating to other views and back
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Select specific microphone and camera devices
Step 4: Navigate to 'Dialpad Calls' view
Step 5: Navigate back to 'Select Devices' view
Step 6: Verify previously selected devices are still selected

description: Open Directory expands sidebar to show secondary panel with sw-directory
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click on 'Open Directory' menu item
Step 3: Verify sidebar expands to show secondary panel
Step 4: Verify sw-directory component is displayed in secondary panel

description: Directory allows searching addresses by name with debounced input
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Open Directory view
Step 3: Locate search input field
Step 4: Type search query quickly
Step 5: Verify search is debounced (doesn't fire immediately on each keystroke)
Step 6: Wait for debounce timeout
Step 7: Verify search results update

description: Directory uses infinite scroll to load more addresses
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Open Directory view
Step 3: Verify initial set of addresses is loaded
Step 4: Scroll down to the bottom of the address list
Step 5: Verify loading indicator appears at bottom
Step 6: Verify additional addresses are automatically loaded
Step 7: Verify new addresses appear in the list
Step 8: Verify no 'Load More' button is present

description: Directory auto-loads and searches when no results match but more addresses available
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Open Directory view with partially loaded addresses
Step 3: Enter a search query that doesn't match currently loaded addresses
Step 4: Verify 'Searching...' indicator appears
Step 5: Verify component automatically loads more addresses
Step 6: Verify search continues until match is found or all addresses loaded
Step 7: If match found, verify matching addresses are displayed
Step 8: If no match after all loaded, verify 'No addresses found' message

description: Directory address list shows name, type, and available channels
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Open Directory view
Step 3: Verify address entries are listed
Step 4: Verify each entry shows name
Step 5: Verify each entry shows type (person/room icon or label)
Step 6: Verify each entry shows available channel indicators

description: Clicking directory address initiates call to that destination
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Open Directory view
Step 3: Click on an address entry in the directory
Step 4: Verify outbound call is initiated to selected address
Step 5: Verify call UI takes over main content area

description: Directory panel remains accessible during active call
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Open Directory view
Step 3: Initiate a call from directory
Step 4: Verify call UI is displayed in main content
Step 5: Verify directory panel in sidebar is still visible/accessible
Step 6: Verify can browse directory while on call

description: Dialpad Calls view displays sw-dialpad component
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click on 'Dialpad Calls' menu item
Step 3: Verify main content area displays sw-dialpad component
Step 4: Verify dialpad keypad is visible with digits 0-9, *, #

description: Dialpad call button is enabled for making calls
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Navigate to Dialpad Calls view
Step 3: Verify call button is present on dialpad
Step 4: Enter a destination number
Step 5: Verify call button is enabled/clickable

description: Dialpad accepts input via keypad clicks
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to Dialpad Calls view
Step 3: Click digit '1' on keypad
Step 4: Click digit '2' on keypad
Step 5: Click digit '3' on keypad
Step 6: Verify display shows '123'

description: Dialpad accepts input via keyboard
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to Dialpad Calls view
Step 3: Focus on dialpad input area
Step 4: Type '456' using keyboard
Step 5: Verify display shows '456'

description: Pressing call button initiates outbound call
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Navigate to Dialpad Calls view
Step 3: Enter destination number '1234567890'
Step 4: Click call button
Step 5: Verify outbound call is initiated
Step 6: Verify call UI is displayed

description: Pressing Enter key initiates outbound call
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Navigate to Dialpad Calls view
Step 3: Enter destination number '1234567890'
Step 4: Press Enter key
Step 5: Verify outbound call is initiated

description: During active call, dialpad allows DTMF digit sending
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate and connect an outbound call
Step 3: Navigate to or access dialpad during call
Step 4: Press a digit on the dialpad
Step 5: Verify DTMF tone is sent over the call

description: Call view occupies full available height of main content area
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate an outbound call
Step 3: Wait for call to connect
Step 4: Verify call view fills entire main content area height
Step 5: Verify no unused space above or below call view

description: sw-call-media displays remote video stream
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate video call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify sw-call-media component is present
Step 4: Verify remote video stream is displayed in sw-call-media

description: sw-participants overlays participant information on video
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify sw-participants component is present
Step 4: Verify participant information overlays on video display

description: sw-self-media shows local video in layout position (mirrored)
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate video call
Step 3: Verify sw-self-media component is present
Step 4: Verify local video is displayed
Step 5: Verify local video is mirrored horizontally

description: sw-call-controls provides mute audio, mute video, screen share, hangup buttons
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify sw-call-controls component is present
Step 4: Verify mute audio button is present and functional
Step 5: Verify mute video button is present and functional
Step 6: Verify screen share button is present
Step 7: Verify hangup button is present and functional

description: sw-call-status shows call state and duration timer
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call
Step 3: Verify sw-call-status component is present
Step 4: Verify call state is displayed (connecting, connected, etc.)
Step 5: Wait for call to connect
Step 6: Verify duration timer starts counting

description: Call controls positioned at bottom of call view
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify sw-call-controls is positioned at bottom of call view
Step 4: Verify controls are centered horizontally

description: Call status/duration visible at top of call view
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify call status/duration is positioned at top of call view

description: Mute audio button toggles local audio mute state
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify audio is initially unmuted
Step 4: Click mute audio button
Step 5: Verify local audio is muted
Step 6: Verify button visual state changes to indicate muted
Step 7: Click mute audio button again
Step 8: Verify local audio is unmuted

description: Mute video button toggles local video mute state
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate video call and wait for connection
Step 3: Verify video is initially unmuted (local video showing)
Step 4: Click mute video button
Step 5: Verify local video is muted/hidden
Step 6: Verify button visual state changes to indicate muted
Step 7: Click mute video button again
Step 8: Verify local video is unmuted/showing

description: Hangup button ends the current call
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate call and wait for connection
Step 3: Click hangup button
Step 4: Verify call is terminated
Step 5: Verify call view closes
Step 6: Verify returns to previous view (dialpad or directory)

description: Inbound call triggers modal overlay with caller information
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call from external caller
Step 3: Verify inbound call modal overlay appears
Step 4: Verify caller information (name, number if available) is displayed
Step 5: Verify modal has semi-transparent dark backdrop

description: Inbound call modal shows Accept and Reject buttons
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Verify inbound call modal appears
Step 4: Verify Accept button (green) is present
Step 5: Verify Reject button (red) is present

description: Accepting inbound call transitions to active call experience
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Click Accept button
Step 4: Verify modal closes
Step 5: Verify active call view is displayed
Step 6: Verify call is connected with remote party

description: Rejecting inbound call dismisses modal and sends reject signal
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Click Reject button
Step 4: Verify modal is dismissed
Step 5: Verify reject signal is sent to caller

description: Accepting new inbound call while on active call hangs up current call first
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate and connect an outbound call
Step 3: Receive new inbound call while on active call
Step 4: Verify inbound call modal appears
Step 5: Click Accept button
Step 6: Verify current call is automatically hung up
Step 7: Verify new inbound call is accepted and connected

description: Inbound call modal auto-dismisses if caller cancels
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Verify inbound call modal appears
Step 4: Wait for caller to cancel the call
Step 5: Verify modal automatically dismisses

description: Inbound call modal shows call direction indicator icon
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Verify modal displays call direction indicator (incoming call icon)

description: Top bar has application logo/title on left
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify top bar is visible
Step 3: Verify application logo or title is positioned on the left side

description: Main content transitions between views without full page reload
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' view
Step 3: Navigate to 'Dialpad Calls' view
Step 4: Verify content transitions smoothly
Step 5: Verify no full page reload occurs (URL doesn't trigger browser navigation)

description: Main content area scrolls if content exceeds viewport
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to a view with long content
Step 3: Resize viewport to be smaller than content
Step 4: Verify scrollbar appears
Step 5: Verify content can be scrolled

description: Comprehensive authentication flow with token mode - end to end user journey
steps: Step 1: Clear any existing session/storage data
Step 2: Navigate to application root URL
Step 3: Verify welcome modal is displayed with backdrop blur
Step 4: Verify 'Enter Token' mode is selected by default
Step 5: Verify input field has appropriate placeholder text for token
Step 6: Enter invalid token format
Step 7: Click submit button
Step 8: Verify error message appears below input
Step 9: Verify modal remains open
Step 10: Clear input and enter valid SAT token
Step 11: Click submit button
Step 12: Verify modal closes with smooth animation
Step 13: Verify main application interface is fully visible
Step 14: Verify top bar displays with registration toggle
Step 15: Verify sidebar is visible with three menu items

description: Comprehensive call flow - outbound call via dialpad end to end
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Toggle registration on
Step 3: Verify registration status shows green/registered
Step 4: Navigate to 'Dialpad Calls' via sidebar
Step 5: Verify dialpad is displayed with all digits 0-9, *, #
Step 6: Enter destination number using keypad clicks
Step 7: Verify number displays in input field
Step 8: Click call button
Step 9: Verify call view appears in main content
Step 10: Verify call status shows 'connecting' or 'ringing'
Step 11: Wait for call to connect
Step 12: Verify call status shows 'connected' and timer starts
Step 13: Verify sw-call-controls are visible at bottom
Step 14: Test mute audio toggle
Step 15: Test mute video toggle
Step 16: Click hangup button
Step 17: Verify call ends and view returns to dialpad

description: Comprehensive inbound call handling - accept and manage call
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Toggle registration on
Step 3: Wait in any view (e.g., Dialpad)
Step 4: Receive inbound call
Step 5: Verify inbound call modal appears with pulsing animation
Step 6: Verify caller name/number is prominently displayed
Step 7: Verify Accept (green) and Reject (red) buttons are visible
Step 8: Click Accept button
Step 9: Verify modal closes
Step 10: Verify call view is displayed
Step 11: Verify remote video/audio is streaming
Step 12: Verify local video (sw-self-media) is visible and mirrored
Step 13: Verify call duration timer is counting
Step 14: Test call controls (mute audio, mute video)
Step 15: Click hangup to end call

description: Comprehensive device management flow - configure all device types
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to 'Select Devices' via sidebar
Step 3: Verify device selector with three labeled dropdowns is displayed
Step 4: Verify Microphone label and dropdown selector is visible
Step 5: Grant microphone permission if prompted
Step 6: Verify audio level indicator is displayed inline below microphone dropdown
Step 7: Make sound and verify indicator responds with color changes
Step 8: Verify Camera label and dropdown selector is visible
Step 9: Grant camera permission if prompted
Step 10: Verify live video preview is shown inline below camera dropdown (mirrored)
Step 11: If multiple cameras available, select different camera from dropdown
Step 12: Verify preview updates to show new camera feed
Step 13: Verify Speaker label and dropdown selector is visible
Step 14: Verify test tone button is present below device sections
Step 15: Click test tone button and verify audio output

description: Welcome modal styling - centered with backdrop blur, 400px max width
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Take screenshot of welcome modal
Step 3: Verify modal is centered horizontally and vertically
Step 4: Verify backdrop has blur effect
Step 5: Verify modal card max-width is 400px

description: Color scheme - Primary SignalWire blue (#044EF5) used for buttons and active states
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to various views
Step 3: Verify primary buttons use #044EF5 (SignalWire blue)
Step 4: Verify active menu items use primary color
Step 5: Verify links use primary color

description: Color scheme - Success green (#10B981) for registered status and accept button
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Toggle registration on
Step 3: Verify registration indicator uses #10B981 (green)
Step 4: Trigger inbound call scenario
Step 5: Verify Accept button uses #10B981 (green)

description: Color scheme - Danger red (#EF4444) for hangup and reject buttons
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and initiate call
Step 2: Verify hangup button uses #EF4444 (red)
Step 3: Trigger inbound call scenario
Step 4: Verify Reject button uses #EF4444 (red)

description: Typography - System fonts used with correct heading sizes
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Take screenshot of main interface
Step 3: Verify font-family is system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif
Step 4: Verify Heading 1 elements are 24px with font-weight 600
Step 5: Verify Heading 2 elements are 18px with font-weight 600
Step 6: Verify body text is 14px with font-weight 400

description: Sidebar dimensions - 240px expanded, 64px collapsed
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify sidebar width is 240px in expanded state
Step 3: Collapse sidebar
Step 4: Verify sidebar width is 64px in collapsed state

description: Sidebar collapse animation - smooth 200ms transition
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify sidebar is expanded
Step 3: Click collapse toggle
Step 4: Verify smooth transition animation (approximately 200ms duration)
Step 5: Verify no janky or instant width change

description: Top bar styling - 56px height with bottom border and subtle shadow
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Take screenshot of top bar
Step 3: Verify top bar height is 56px
Step 4: Verify bottom border separator is present
Step 5: Verify white background with subtle shadow

description: Active menu item styling - primary color background tint and icon color
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click on a menu item to make it active
Step 3: Verify active item has primary color background tint
Step 4: Verify active item icon uses primary color
Step 5: Verify inactive items do not have these styles

description: Inbound call modal - pulsing ring animation on card border
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Receive inbound call
Step 3: Verify inbound call modal appears
Step 4: Verify pulsing ring animation is visible on card border
Step 5: Verify animation attracts visual attention

description: Call view dark theme - dark background for video visibility
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and initiate call
Step 2: Wait for call to connect
Step 3: Verify call view has dark theme/background
Step 4: Verify video content is clearly visible against dark background

description: Call view video container - 16:9 aspect ratio preference
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and initiate video call
Step 2: Wait for call to connect
Step 3: Verify video container maintains 16:9 aspect ratio where possible
Step 4: Verify video scales to fit available space

description: Token input uses monospace font
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Verify token input field uses monospace font (ui-monospace, monospace)

description: Main content padding provides breathing room
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to various views
Step 3: Verify main content area has appropriate padding
Step 4: Verify content is not flush against edges

description: Surface color (#F9FAFB) used for sidebar and elevated surfaces
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify sidebar background uses #F9FAFB (light gray)
Step 3: Verify card/elevated surface backgrounds use #F9FAFB

description: Border color (#E5E7EB) used for dividers and input borders
steps: Step 1: Authenticate and navigate app
Step 2: Verify dividers use #E5E7EB (light gray)
Step 3: Verify input field borders use #E5E7EB

description: Application loads and becomes interactive within 3 seconds
steps: Step 1: Clear browser cache
Step 2: Start performance timer
Step 3: Navigate to application root URL
Step 4: Wait for welcome modal to appear and be interactive
Step 5: Stop timer
Step 6: Verify total time is under 3 seconds

description: All UI interactions provide immediate visual feedback (< 100ms)
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Click sidebar menu item and measure time to visual feedback
Step 3: Verify feedback appears in under 100ms
Step 4: Click buttons and verify immediate visual response
Step 5: Toggle switches and verify immediate state change

description: Graceful handling of WebSocket disconnection with reconnection attempts
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Verify WebSocket connection is established
Step 3: Simulate network disconnection
Step 4: Verify UI shows disconnected state
Step 5: Verify reconnection attempts are made
Step 6: Restore network connection
Step 7: Verify reconnection succeeds and UI updates

description: Clear error messages for network failure scenarios
steps: Step 1: Simulate network offline state
Step 2: Attempt to authenticate
Step 3: Verify clear, user-friendly error message is displayed
Step 4: Verify error indicates network issue

description: Clear error messages for permission denial scenarios
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Navigate to device selection
Step 3: Deny camera permission when prompted
Step 4: Verify clear error message explains permission was denied
Step 5: Verify app doesn't crash or freeze

description: Keyboard navigation - all interactive elements accessible via keyboard
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application and authenticate
Step 2: Use Tab key to navigate through interface
Step 3: Verify all interactive elements receive focus
Step 4: Verify focus indicator is visible
Step 5: Verify Enter/Space activates focused elements

description: ARIA labels present on interactive elements
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Inspect sidebar menu items for ARIA labels
Step 3: Inspect buttons for ARIA labels
Step 4: Inspect toggle switches for ARIA labels
Step 5: Verify labels are descriptive and meaningful

description: Responsive layout - functional on 768px width viewport
steps: Step 1: Set viewport width to 768px
Step 2: Navigate to application and authenticate
Step 3: Verify layout adapts appropriately
Step 4: Verify all features remain functional
Step 5: Verify no horizontal overflow/scroll

description: Responsive layout - call view adjusts for different viewport sizes
steps: Step 1: Authenticate and initiate call
Step 2: Test at 1920px width - verify call view layout
Step 3: Resize to 1024px width - verify layout adjusts
Step 4: Resize to 768px width - verify layout adjusts
Step 5: Verify controls remain accessible at all sizes

description: Media permissions requested only when needed (lazy permission request)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Authenticate with valid token
Step 3: Verify no media permission prompts appear yet
Step 4: Navigate to device selection
Step 5: Verify permissions are requested when device selector component loads

description: Console logging for debugging without exposing sensitive token data
steps: Step 1: Open browser developer console
Step 2: Navigate to application and authenticate with token
Step 3: Review console logs
Step 4: Verify helpful debug information is logged
Step 5: Verify token/credentials are NOT logged in plain text

description: Clean disconnection on page unload (beforeunload handler)
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token and register
Step 2: Initiate an active call
Step 3: Monitor network requests
Step 4: Close browser tab or navigate away
Step 5: Verify clean disconnection signal is sent
Step 6: Verify no zombie connections remain

description: Comprehensive visual audit of welcome modal
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application root URL
Step 2: Take full screenshot of welcome modal
Step 3: Verify SignalWire logo is at top and properly sized
Step 4: Verify mode toggle is styled consistently
Step 5: Verify input field has proper styling (borders, padding)
Step 6: Verify submit button is full width with proper colors
Step 7: Verify backdrop blur effect is visible
Step 8: Verify modal shadow/elevation effect
Step 9: Verify error message area styling when error shown
Step 10: Verify loading spinner styling during URL fetch

description: Comprehensive visual audit of main application layout
steps: Step 1: Authenticate with valid token
Step 2: Take full page screenshot
Step 3: Verify top bar spans full width at top
Step 4: Verify sidebar positioned correctly on left
Step 5: Verify main content fills remaining space
Step 6: Verify proper spacing between elements (4px base unit)
Step 7: Verify color scheme is consistently applied
Step 8: Verify typography hierarchy is correct
Step 9: Verify interactive elements have proper hover states
Step 10: Verify overall visual harmony and professional appearance

description: Comprehensive visual audit of active call view
steps: Step 1: Authenticate and initiate video call
Step 2: Wait for call to connect
Step 3: Take screenshot of call view
Step 4: Verify dark theme background
Step 5: Verify remote video fills available space
Step 6: Verify self-media positioned correctly and mirrored
Step 7: Verify participants overlay styling
Step 8: Verify call status at top is readable
Step 9: Verify call controls at bottom are properly styled
Step 10: Verify all control icons are clear and recognizable
